zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Braose於1197年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根高維爾時，他的父親William de Braose IV23歲，母親Matilda de Clare16歲。他於1219年與Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire在英國英格蘭諾福爾可海頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1232年7月18日在英國素可布拉波 卡素享年35歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾阿可波瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Braose于1197年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根高維爾时，他的父亲William de Braose IV23岁，母亲Matilda de Clare16岁。他于1219年与Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire在英国英格兰諾福爾可海頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1232年7月18日在英国素可布拉波 卡素享年35岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾阿可波瑞。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Braose was born in 1197, in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales, his father, William de Braose IV, was 23 and his mother, Matilda de Clare, was 16. He married Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire in 1219, in Heydon, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 18 July 1232, in Bramber Castle, Sussex, England, at the age of 35, and was buried in Aconbury, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Gower, Glamorgan, Wales: Gower, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Braose est né en 1197, à Gower, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, William de Braose IV, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Clare, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire en 1219, à Heydon, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 18 juillet 1232, à Bramber Castle, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Aconbury, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Braose 1197 in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Braose IV 23 und seine Mutter Matilda de Clare 16. Er hat 1219 in Heydon, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 18. Juli 1232 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Bramber Castle, Sussex, England und wurde in Aconbury, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Braose è nato il nel 1197 nel Gower, Glamorgan, Galles, il suo padre, William de Braose IV, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Matilda de Clare, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire nel 1219, nel Heydon, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 18 luglio 1232, nel Bramber Castle, Sussex, England, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Aconbury, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Braoseが1197年にウェールズグラモーガンゴウエルで生まれた時，父William de Braose IVは23歳，母Matilda de Clareは16歳であった。1219年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクヘイドンでMargred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1232年7月18日にイギリススセックスブランバー カストルで35歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアアコンブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Braose(이)가 1197년 웨일스 글램르건 가워에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Braose IV(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Clare(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1219년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 헤이던에서 Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1232년 7월 18일 영국 수세스 브램버 카스틀에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 악버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Braose nasceu em 1197, em Gower, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, William de Braose IV, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Clare, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire em 1219, em Heydon, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 18 de julho de 1232, em Bramber Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Aconbury, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Gower, Glamorgan, Wales: Gower, Glamorgan, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Braose родился в 1197 г. в местности гоуир, глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени William de Braose IV было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Clare, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire в 1219 г. в местности хидон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 18 июля 1232 г. в местности брэмбир кастл, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности аконбури, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Braose nació en 1197, en Gower, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, William de Braose IV, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Matilda de Clare, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire en 1219, en Heydon, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 18 de julio de 1232, en Bramber Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Aconbury, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
